---
name: "Bug"
about: "Use this template for reporting a bug"
type: "Bug"
---

# Description

<!-- Usually written by the **Tester**, **QA Engineer**, or **User** who found the issue. -->

<!-- A bug is an unintended error, defect, or flaw in the system that prevents it from functioning as expected. -->

<!-- Provide a short, clear summary of the bug. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- "Login button is unresponsive in Safari browser." -->

---

# Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Written by the **person reporting the bug**. -->

<!-- These steps help developers reproduce the issue consistently. -->
<!-- Without reproducible steps, the bug may be hard to verify or fix. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- 1. Go to the login page -->
<!-- 2. Enter valid credentials -->
<!-- 3. Click the login button -->
<!-- 4. Nothing happens -->

---

# Expected Behavior

<!-- Written by the **Reporter** or **Stakeholder**. -->

<!-- Describe what SHOULD happen if the system were working correctly. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- "Clicking the login button should log the user in and redirect them to the dashboard." -->

---

# Actual Behavior

<!-- Written by the **Reporter**. -->

<!-- Describe what ACTUALLY happens. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- "Clicking the login button does nothing. No error messages appear." -->

---

# Screenshots / Logs

<!-- Provided by the **Reporter** or **QA Tester**. -->

<!-- Attach screenshots, console logs, or error outputs to help diagnose the issue. -->

---

# Environment

<!-- Bugs often depend on environment. Include details about the system where the bug appeared. -->

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 22.04)  
- **Browser/App Version:** (e.g., Chrome 118, Safari 17)  
- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 14, Dell XPS 15)  

---

# Dependency Links

<!-- Often added by the **Developers** or **Project Manager**. -->

<!-- Mention related features, stories, or other bugs this issue depends on. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- - Story #12: User Authentication Flow -->
<!-- - Bug #7: Session Timeout Issue -->

---

# Notes

<!-- Open space for **any team member** to add context. -->

<!-- Example: -->
<!-- - Bug only happens on Safari, not Chrome -->
<!-- - Might be related to JavaScript event handling -->
